stories.headline: Anthropic releases Claude 4 with extended context — 500K token window reshapes enterprise RAG architecture decisions
stories.headline_bold: Anthropic releases Claude 4 with extended context
stories.summary: The 500K token window fundamentally changes RAG design tradeoffs. Enterprises will reconsider chunking strategies and retrieval pipelines built for shorter context models.

stories.headline: Databricks Unity Catalog adds AI asset governance — models, prompts and embeddings now first-class governed objects alongside tables
stories.headline_bold: Databricks Unity Catalog adds AI asset governance
stories.summary: This closes the gap between data governance and model governance. Single lineage graph from raw data to model output is now achievable on Databricks.

stories.headline: EU AI Act enforcement begins Q3 2026 — data lineage requirements tighten for any AI system touching EU citizen data
stories.headline_bold: EU AI Act enforcement begins Q3 2026
stories.summary: High-risk AI systems must now demonstrate data provenance. Organizations without mature lineage tooling face 6-figure fines starting September.

stories.headline: Gartner: 68% of CDOs report AI projects blocked by data quality issues, not model capability — confirms data-first thesis
stories.headline_bold: 68% of CDOs report AI projects blocked by data quality issues
stories.summary: The number is up from 51% in 2024. The data-first narrative is now mainstream — the window to differentiate on this positioning is narrowing.

stories.headline: dbt Cloud launches Semantic Layer v2 — native LLM query routing for natural language BI without custom middleware
stories.headline_bold: dbt Cloud launches Semantic Layer v2
stories.summary: Semantic layer becomes the AI interface layer. Teams with clean dbt models get natural language queries for free. Teams without pay the tax in hallucinations.
